login.title: Data Editing System Login
login.label: Login
login.summary: The entry screen where users sign in, request password-reset guidance, or start signup.
purpose: Start a system session with a login ID and password.
Use English before login, then apply the user's configured language after successful login.

layout.name: Login credentials
layout.description: Enter the login ID and password.

layout.name: Target DB area
layout.description: Shows the Target DB context available after login.

layout.name: Support actions
layout.description: Provides forgot-password, signup, and login actions.

workflow: Enter the login ID and password.
After login, the system loads the user language setting and Target DB context.
controls: Forgot password: shows administrator contact and request guidance.
Sign up: opens the new account request flow.
Login: signs in with the entered account.
aiGuidance: Before login, use English as the default screen language.
Do not include passwords, API keys, or other secrets in answers.

home.title: INIT Data Editing System
home.label: Main Home
home.summary: The start screen for checking the current user, role, Target DB, integrated scenario status, notices, and main shortcuts after login.

M01001.title: Project Settings
M01001.label: Project Settings
M01001.summary: Registers, reviews, updates, and deletes projects, which are the top-level work units for data editing.

M01002.title: Scenario Definition
M01002.label: Scenario Definition
M01002.summary: Defines and manages data editing scenarios under a selected project.

M02001.title: File Upload Management
M02001.label: File Upload
M02001.summary: Uploads local files into Target DB work tables and supports preview, column review, and data lookup.

M02002.title: Target Data Selection
M02002.label: Target Data
M02002.summary: Browses Target DB tables and selects the target tables used by projects and scenarios.

M03001.title: Data Profiling
M03001.label: Data Profiling
M03001.summary: Defines and runs profiling jobs for target-table statistics, missing values, duplicates, distributions, and column quality.

M03002.title: Column Correlation Analysis
M03002.label: Column Correlation Analysis
M03002.summary: Analyzes relationships, correlations, and dependencies between columns in the selected target data.

M03003.title: Automatic Rule Discovery
M03003.label: Automatic Rule Discovery
M03003.summary: Discovers candidate data-quality rules from profiling and analysis results.

M03004.title: Rule Violation Detection
M03004.label: Rule Violation Detection
M03004.summary: Runs rules or models to detect records that violate expected data-quality conditions.

M04001.title: Editing Scenario Design
M04001.label: Editing Scenario Design
M04001.summary: Designs, validates, and runs reusable integrated editing DAGs by connecting data jobs and model executions as nodes and edges.

M04002.title: Editing Scenario Analysis
M04002.label: Editing Scenario Analysis
M04002.summary: Interprets integrated flow run history, node results, result tables, Oracle ML model details, correlation, LASSO, symbolic rules, and violation summaries.

M05001.title: Discovered Rule Selection
M05001.label: Discovered Rule Selection
M05001.summary: A planned screen for reviewing automatically discovered rule candidates and selecting rules for actual use.

M05002.title: User Rule Registration
M05002.label: User Rule Registration
M05002.summary: A planned screen for registering manual data-quality rules or adjusting discovered rule candidates.

M06001.title: Rule Violation Data View
M06001.label: Rule Violation Data View
M06001.summary: A planned screen for reviewing detected violation records and identifying data that may need cleansing.

M06002.title: Error Data Cleansing
M06002.label: Error Data Cleansing
M06002.summary: A planned screen for cleansing, correcting, validating, and tracking changes to error or violation data.

M07001.title: Editing Effect Validation
M07001.label: Editing Effect Validation
M07001.summary: A planned screen for comparing data-quality indicators before and after cleansing to validate editing impact.

M07002.title: Final DB Apply
M07002.label: Final DB Apply
M07002.summary: A planned screen for applying validated cleansing results to the Target DB after impact and approval checks.

M07003.title: Editing History
M07003.label: Editing History
M07003.summary: A planned screen for reviewing cleansing, validation, apply, and audit history.

M90001.title: Internal Model Registration
M90001.label: Internal Model Registration
M90001.summary: Browses Target DB procedures, packages, and model objects and registers them as executable internal model resources.

M90002.title: External Model Registration
M90002.label: External Model Registration
M90002.summary: Registers and manages external models, OML4Py resources, script repository resources, and API contracts.

M91001.title: My Account
M91001.label: My Account
M91001.summary: Manages the current user's account information and personal Gemini API key status.

M91002.title: My System Settings
M91002.label: My System Settings
M91002.summary: Manages user-level system settings and personal account or Gemini key related settings.

M91003.title: Editing Defaults
M91003.label: Editing Defaults
M91003.summary: Manages Target DB-level default values used by profiling, analysis, and editing workflows.

M99001.title: DB Connection Settings
M99001.label: DB Connection Settings
M99001.summary: Lets administrators register, test, initialize, and manage Target DB connection settings.

M99002.title: Database Management
M99002.label: Database Management
M99002.summary: Lets administrators browse Target DB objects and inspect table data, columns, source, and SQL results.

M99003.title: System Management
M99003.label: System Management
M99003.summary: Supports system initialization checks, system table review, user approval, password reset, and administrator operations.

M99004.title: Notice Management
M99004.label: Notice Management
M99004.summary: Lets administrators create, update, delete, and attach files to notices shown on the HOME screen and related areas.
